<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes; /** * @method static isReadonlyIf(bool $condition, bool $readonly) * @method static isReadonlyIfNotNull(bool $condition, bool $readonly) * @method static isReadonlyUnless(bool $condition, bool $readonly) */ trait ReadonlyTrait { /** * @param bool $readonly * * @return static */ public function isReadonly($readonly = true) { return $readonly ? $this->attribute('readonly') : $this->forgetAttribute('readonly'); } }
